/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -pedantic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Fractals_random_static.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Fractals_random_static.dir/progs/demos/Fractals_random/fractals_random.c.o -o bin/Fractals_random_static  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so lib/libglut.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lm
